title: [PBR]Better weapons and tools(更好的武器和工具)
description: The sword was changed to the appearance of a knife,the bow has been changed to the appearance of a recurve bow,and tools have different details, PBR is supported,and Excellent compatibility！
body:
## Overview
The original sword was changed to the appearance of a knife,the bow has been changed to the appearance of a recurve bow,and tools have different details,at the same time, it enhanced the enchanted glint light effects and better Mace.

## I often make some unreliable small updates, and unless you're curious, the trial version is not recommended.

#### If the game shows 'Corrupted or Incompatible', please ignore it. This is because there are file paths added to accommodate older versions.

**_If you'd like to keep track of future updates, place following my resource pack._**

> It is permissible to learn, but direct publication without permission is not allowed.

~~**This is still a semi-finished product.**~~(Completed)

_**A durability below 20% will have a special appearance,~~The tools section will be completed in a future update.~~**_(Completed)

> labPBR is supported


<details>
<summary>Come and check out this resource pack too,It is modeling the items.</summary>

Makes Items to be 3D,but faithful to the original.

[Swd's 3D-Items](https://modrinth.com/project/k0yXOFFb)

</details>

## content

(I haven't updated the showcase images for a long time, so they might differ somewhat from the current resultsXD)

<details>
<summary>Unimportant words</summary>
  Finally finished,although this is the first texture pack I've made, I also try to make everyone happy.
  After I finished it, I found that the compatibility of this resource pack was surprisingly good, and I tested it to version 1.17 without any problems,although some special features may be lost, it can still function normally.Who would have thought I originally wanted to create a high version of the resource pack?
</details>
